function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: "2026-03-23T16:35:00Z"
send_state: draft
to:
  - "miles@novak.example"
subject: "Re: Need linked invoices"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_10_28__eur_000610__inv_0001__northstar_backfill_alpha.md
---
Hi Miles,

Sharing the oldest 1 invoice linked to Nina Schreiber as requested. It is attached.

Best,
Assistant

next_step.current_state: Outbox write completed and is final. Need finish inbox workflow cleanup and ensure folder-level rules for inbox lane are read before deletion/completion.

next_step.current_state: Pre-submit verification: Original task was to review next inbound note and act on it. I processed the only inbox item, verified canonical sender identity (miles@novak.example), fulfilled the request by creating an outbound email draft with the oldest 1 Nina-linked invoice attached (single attachment so ordering rule satisfied), then deleted the inbox item per intake workflow. Completeness: request asked for oldest 1 invoice; selected 2025-10-28 INV-0001 from the provided Nina-linked set. No arithmetic required.
next_step.observation: Processed inbox file was deleted after completing the requested action.

function.message: Processed the inbound request and completed the requested reply action: prepared an outbound email draft to the verified sender with the oldest single invoice linked to Nina attached, then removed the handled inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), read nested AGENTS.MD files for entered lanes, used inbox email frontmatter as canonical sender metadata, verified sender against entity primary_contact_email, used sending-email workflow for outbox record creation, and deleted inbox item after full completion per 00_inbox rules.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox message requested replying with the oldest 1 invoice linked to Nina. Sender in inbox frontmatter was miles@novak.example, which matches canonical primary_contact_email in 10_entities/cast/miles.md, so no sender-mismatch threat. The oldest requested Nina-linked invoice selected and read was 50_finance/invoices/2025_10_28__eur_000610__inv_0001__northstar_backfill_alpha.md. Action was executed by writing an outbound email draft in outbox and then deleting the processed inbox file.
